stage_definitions.stage1: MVP — 4-6 weeks. Launcher + restriction primitives + anti-uninstall + onboarding. Author must dogfood without bypass before exit.
stage_definitions.stage2: V1 — 3-4 months. Track engine, full Sad Self, Mantra Gate, psychology stack, productivity loop, basic integrations, backup. Beta with 100 testers.
stage_definitions.stage3: V2 — 6+ months. Social tier, financial stakes, hardware (NFC/breath/posture), couples/family, Plaid + life integrations, Built Wrapped MVP, AI insight engine.
stage_definitions.stage4: V3 — 12+ months. Marketplace, dashboards (B2B), web/desktop companion, WearOS, AI Life Coach, multi-domain Wrapped, Counterfactual Twin, full social experimentation surfaces.

stage1_mvp.summary: A launcher that hurts to leave. Bare minimum to dogfood.

features.name: Custom Launcher Home Screen
features.description: Replace default home screen. Shows projects, todos, behavior indicator, 5 widgets max, 5 app dock.

features.name: 5-App Dock (2 Fixed + 3 User)
features.description: Max 5 apps visible. Phone + Messages fixed. 3 user-configurable with 24hr cooldown.

features.name: Hidden App Search (No Drawer)
features.description: No browseable drawer. Swipe up → search bar. Must type name to launch hidden apps.

features.name: App Usage Tracking
features.description: Time per app, unlock count, session duration, foreground detection.

features.name: Widget System (Max 5 Our Widgets)
features.description: 5 widget slots, FocusLauncher-only widgets (no 3rd party).

features.name: The Lobby (Wait Timer)
features.description: Mandatory wait screen before distraction app opens. 15s productive, 90s distractions. No skip.

features.name: Cognitive Tax (Puzzles Before App)
features.description: Solve puzzle to open distraction. Scales with daily opens.

features.name: Progressive Dimming Overlay
features.description: Overlay dims screen 2%/min in distraction apps. Near-black at 25min.

features.name: VIP Contact List (Max 10)
features.description: Up to 10 numbers always ring through. 24hr cooldown on edits.

features.name: Silent Mode Enforcement
features.description: DND by default during focus. Only VIP/pass calls break silence.

features.name: Todo System with App-Unlock Rewards
features.description: Todos that, on completion, unlock a specific app for a defined duration. Verification: none/photo/timer/location/companion.

features.name: Project Tracking (Max 3 Active)
features.description: Projects with tasks, milestones, progress bar. Main home screen element.

features.name: Behavior Indicator (5-State Meter)
features.description: Real-time meter: Thriving → Neutral → Drifting → Sinking → Drowning.

features.name: Intervention Screen (14 Unlocks)
features.description: Full-screen after excessive unlocks: 'This is attempt #14. Phone is not your friend.'

features.name: Device Admin Registration
features.description: Register as Device Administrator. Greys out uninstall button.

features.name: In-App Deactivation Flow (72hr Cooldown)
features.description: App-controlled deactivation flow with 72hr countdown and daily check-ins.

features.name: First-Run Sequencer
features.description: Guided 20-min ritual: permissions, mantra capture, future-self video, VIP contacts, baseline observation start.

features.name: Why Are You Here? Capture
features.description: First screen captures the user's pain verbatim. Resurfaced at every weak moment and uninstall attempt.

features.name: Manipulation Transparency Page
features.description: Settings page lists every psychological technique used + per-technique toggle to disable.

features.name: Accessibility Pass
features.description: TalkBack-friendly overlays, type-mantra fallback, switch-control, high contrast.

stage2_v1.summary: Track engine + full psychology stack + productivity loop + first integrations + backup.

features.name: Variable Ratio Punishment
features.description: Restrictions are RANDOM. Sometimes app works, sometimes locked. Unpredictability breaks habits.

features.name: The Boredom Preservatory
features.description: 2-min intervals of NOTHING. Blank screen. Trains boredom tolerance.

features.name: Intent Declaration
features.description: State intention + timer before opening distraction. Fail to finish = app locked for day.

features.name: Escalating Lockout
features.description: Open blocked app → locked out of everything. 5min → 30min → 2hr escalation.

features.name: Gatekeeper Tasks
features.description: Complete boring math/Duolingo-style task before accessing distraction.

features.name: Time Debt System
features.description: Overspent today? Double penalty tomorrow. Debt compounds.

features.name: Context-Aware Locks (GPS+Time+Calendar)
features.description: At gym=music only. At desk 9-5=work only. In bed after 10pm=kindle only.

features.name: Dream Mode (Night Wind-Down)
features.description: After 10pm: tomorrow's schedule, quote, breathing exercise. Apps disappear.

features.name: One App At A Time (No Multitask)
features.description: No app switcher. 3-second close animation before next app opens.

features.name: App Roulette Lock
features.description: Pick 3 apps. System randomly allows ONE per day.

features.name: Reverse Notifications (Scheduled Check-Ins)
features.description: No push notifications. Manual check-in at 2-3 windows per day.

features.name: The Replacement Engine
features.description: Intercept distraction app open → offer micro-action (2 pages, 10 pushups, 3 sentences). Accept = earn time.

features.name: Mantra Gate (Voice Unlock)
features.description: Speak mantra 5 times verified by speech recognition before phone unlocks.

features.name: Mantra Scaling by Track Level
features.description: 1 → 3 → 5 reps based on track level. Level 8+ adds today's task statement.

features.name: Whisper Mode / Type Fallback
features.description: Whisper detection or type mantra 5 times for public settings.

features.name: Emergency Pass System (5/week)
features.description: 5 weekly passes for non-VIP calls. Resets Monday. Repeat caller (2x/3min) free.

features.name: Hover Window for Calls
features.description: Floating overlay during focus showing caller + answer/decline.

features.name: Auto-Reply on Decline
features.description: Decline call → pre-written SMS: 'In focus mode. Will call back in X min.'

features.name: Journal / Day Summary (Auto-Generated)
features.description: Nightly auto-summary: focus score, todos done, project progress, AI insight, mood input.

features.name: Focus Timer (Pomodoro Built-In)
features.description: 25min focus blocks as widget. Between blocks: brief app window. Auto-DND.

features.name: Face-Down Detection
features.description: Proximity sensor detects phone face-down. Tracks duration. Rewards intentional breaks.

features.name: Morning Routine Sequencer
features.description: First 60min after alarm: one task at a time, sequential. Nothing else accessible.

features.name: Shutdown Ritual
features.description: End-of-day prompt: what you shipped + tomorrow's #1 priority. Enter evening mode.

features.name: The One Thing (Daily Priority Pin)
features.description: Declare ONE most important task each morning. Pinned all day. Reminded every 2hr.

features.name: Time Blocking Enforcer (Calendar Integration)
features.description: Calendar says 'Deep Work 9-11am' → phone ENFORCES it. Apps locked.

features.name: Nourishing Consumption Category
features.description: Third category beyond Productive/Distraction: Nourishing (Kindle, audiobooks, Duolingo). Encouraged.

features.name: Mood Pings (2x Daily Emotion Check)
features.description: Two 5-second mood check-ins per day. Emoji tap + 1-word note. Paired with usage stats.

features.name: Track System (Gradual Commitment Scaling)
features.description: 10-level commitment paths. Start tiny. Scale on proven 7-day consistency.

features.name: Level-Up / Demotion Mechanics
features.description: 7 success days = level up. 3 fail days = drop one level (grace period).

features.name: Multiple Independent Tracks
features.description: Separate tracks: Deep Work, Sleep, Morning Routine, Fitness, Learning. Each levels independently.

features.name: Smart Starting Point (Baseline Detection)
features.description: Observe usage 3 days before Level 1. Never require >25% behavior change from baseline.

features.name: Sad Self Notifications (Personified Regret)
features.description: Notifications from 'Sad [Name]' — future self that loses when you scroll.

features.name: Voice Style Selection (4 Personalities)
features.description: Gentle/Blunt/Sarcastic/Philosophical voices.

features.name: Celebration Self (Proud [Name])
features.description: Same character, positive messages when doing well.

features.name: Adaptive Frequency (Back-Off on Ignore)
features.description: Ignore 5 messages = Sad Self gets quieter. One powerful message max.

features.name: Identity Voting (Consumer vs Creator)
features.description: Every app open framed as vote: Consumer or Creator? Single tap.

features.name: Session Receipts
features.description: After closing any app: full-screen receipt showing time spent + equivalents.

features.name: Legacy Counter (Lifetime Stats)
features.description: Home widget: 'Entertainment: 4,247hr. Creation: 312hr. Ratio: 13.6:1.'

features.name: Builder/Consumer Mode Toggle
features.description: Two modes. Builder = unlimited productive apps. Consumer = daily entertainment budget.

features.name: The Mirror Widget (Camera as Wallpaper)
features.description: Front camera as home screen background. See your face every unlock.

features.name: Future Self Video (Pre-Recorded Deterrent)
features.description: Record video during strong moment. Plays before every relapse. Can't skip.

features.name: Opportunity Cost Ticker (Overlay)
features.description: Persistent overlay: 'This session = $34.50 at your hourly rate.'

features.name: The Last Day Test
features.description: 'If you die tomorrow, would your last 30 min be this?' Yes/No before distraction.

features.name: Phantom Vibration Counter
features.description: Detects phone checks without notification. 'You checked for no reason 34 times today.'

features.name: Future Self Messenger (Scheduled Letters)
features.description: Write letters that deliver at random future weak moments.

features.name: Nuclear Passphrase
features.description: 20+ char passphrase set on install. Written on paper. Required to begin uninstall.

features.name: Future Self Video on Uninstall Attempt
features.description: Future-self video plays full-length, can't skip, before uninstall proceeds.

features.name: Graduated Freedom
features.description: Restrictions ease over time. By Level 10, near-invisible. No reason to remove.

features.name: The Applause
features.description: Put phone DOWN after short use → speaker plays applause. Pavlov for quitting.

features.name: Compound Time Bank
features.description: Every avoided minute banks with compound interest. Monthly earnings report.

features.name: Productivity Heatmap Widget
features.description: GitHub-style hourly heatmap. Green=focused. Red=wasted.

features.name: Streak System (Multi-Domain)
features.description: Separate streaks for focus, sleep, creation, todos. Each with counter and record.

features.name: Grace Day System
features.description: 1-2 declared grace days per month. Zero penalty. Must be declared in advance.

features.name: Streak Freeze (Earnable)
features.description: Earn 1 streak freeze per 30 perfect days. Auto-applies on miss. Max 3 in reserve.

features.name: Compassionate Demotion
features.description: Dropping a level framed as 'recalibration'. Recovery plan. Faster re-promotion next time.

features.name: After-Fall Ritual
features.description: After a streak break: 3-step ritual — reflect, recommit smaller scope, optional message to partner.

features.name: Crisis Detection & Soften Mode
features.description: Detect concerning patterns (3am scrolling + zero todos + low motion + flat mood). Pause Sad Self, surface help.

features.name: Encrypted Cloud Backup & Device Migration
features.description: E2EE backup of journal/streak/track/social. Restore on new device.

features.name: Data Export (PDF / CSV / Photo Book)
features.description: Journal as PDF, stats as CSV, year heatmap as image.

features.name: HealthConnect Integration
features.description: Read all body data (steps, sleep, HR, HRV, workouts, weight, cycle, mindfulness) from HealthConnect.

features.name: Daily Activity Loop
features.description: Steps, active minutes, calories, floors. Apple-rings-style daily goals widget.

features.name: Sleep Stats Dashboard
features.description: Duration, debt, consistency, stages from HealthConnect.

stage3_v2.summary: Social tier (the moat), financial stakes, hardware, life integrations, Wrapped MVP, AI insight engine.

features.name: Weather-Gated Apps
features.description: Beautiful day? Entertainment locked. Only unlocks in bad weather.

features.name: The Paradox Lock
features.description: Write 50-word essay on why you SHOULDN'T open app. AI judges. Good=locked. Bad=also locked.

features.name: Choice Overload Weapon
features.description: 47 alternative activities in chaotic grid. Decision fatigue → give up.

features.name: Per-App Network Blocking (VPN)
features.description: Cut internet to specific apps via local VPN. Instagram opens but shows nothing new.

features.name: Bandwidth Throttling
features.description: Throttle to 1kbps. Videos won't load. Text-only experience.

features.name: Life-State Mode Set
features.description: Commute, Travel, Sick, Vacation, Weekend modes. Auto or manual.

features.name: Lite Mode for Distraction Apps
features.description: Open IG in text-only/grayscale/no-Reels mode. VPN content stripping + overlay.

features.name: Voice-to-Todo Capture
features.description: Double-tap power button → 5sec voice → AI converts to todo + project.

features.name: Idea Parking Lot
features.description: Gesture captures screenshot + note while in distraction. Convert later to project tasks.

features.name: Effort Estimation Training
features.description: Estimate task time on creation. Log actual. Track estimation accuracy.

features.name: Input/Output Ratio Tracker
features.description: Consumption vs creation ratio on home screen.

features.name: Energy Zones
features.description: User tags energy by time of day. Phone adapts: high=deep work only.

features.name: Cycle / Energy-Window Awareness
features.description: Optional menstrual cycle / energy tracking. Adjusts expectations.

features.name: Companion Verification for Todos
features.description: Friend confirms task completion via push. Prevents fake-todo gaming.

features.name: AI-Generated Messages (On-Device LLM)
features.description: Move from templates to on-device AI for contextual messages.

features.name: Deathbed Simulator (Lifespan Projection)
features.description: Monthly: 'At current rate: 11.3 years on social by end of life.'

features.name: Pattern Detection & Insights
features.description: '38 of 47 failures between 2-4pm. After Sarah's notification.' AI finds your patterns.

features.name: Anchoring Attack
features.description: Show 'most disciplined user: 12min total' before your stats.

features.name: App Tombstones
features.description: Killed/deleted apps show gravestones on home screen.

features.name: Group Creation & Management
features.description: Create accountability groups. Invite. Shared streaks, voting, visibility.

features.name: Group Uninstall Approval (Voting)
features.description: Can't uninstall without group vote. Majority required.

features.name: Shame Notification to Friends
features.description: Fail → silent notification to friend.

features.name: Team Streaks
features.description: Squad of 5. All must stay installed. You quit = everyone's streak dies.

features.name: The Disappointment API
features.description: One respected person gets ONE notification/week: your worst stat.

features.name: Co-Working Presence (Live Focus Status)
features.description: See group members in focus mode. Avatars + green dots on home screen.

features.name: Sponsor System (AA-Style)
features.description: Designated person notified on uninstall attempt. Can call you.

features.name: Public Builder Profile
features.description: Shareable profile URL with streaks, projects, heatmap, badges.

features.name: Built Wrapped (Year in Review)
features.description: Annual recap: projects shipped, hours saved, top distraction defeated. Screen-shareable.

features.name: Built Verification Badge
features.description: Earned after 365 days + 3 shipped projects + 3 vouches. Visible checkmark.

features.name: Receipt Wall
features.description: Phone-down-within-3min adds small tile to profile wall. Texture of restraint.

features.name: Anti-Bio
features.description: Bio describes what user has chosen NOT to do.

features.name: Profile Highlight Reels
features.description: Pinnable permanent stories on profile (shipped projects, streaks). Data-verified.

features.name: Chronological Feed (No Algorithm)
features.description: Followed users only, reverse-chronological. No algorithm.

features.name: Disappointment Inbox
features.description: Feed surface for Sad Self + accountability disappointment notes.

features.name: Focus Stories (24hr Ephemeral)
features.description: End-of-day card auto-generated from data. 24hr expiry.

features.name: Dual Streaks With Friends (🔥)
features.description: Both hit daily focus goal = shared fire. Snapchat retention mechanic.

features.name: Push Reactions to Friend's Failure
features.description: Friend opens TikTok 10th time → your phone buzzes. One-tap reactions.

features.name: Focus DMs (Queued During Deep Work)
features.description: DMs sent during recipient's focus block are queued for after.

features.name: Public Pre-Commitments
features.description: Post tomorrow's goals to feed. Auto-graded at end of day.

features.name: Quiet Brag Post
features.description: Finish One Thing → app prompts 'share?' One-tap post. 🙏 reactions.

features.name: Public Shame Post on Uninstall
features.description: Uninstall auto-posts to community/friends: '[Name] quit after X days.'

features.name: Relapse Prediction on Uninstall Screen
features.description: '94% of users who uninstalled at day 12 reinstalled in 9 days.'

features.name: Focus Score Economy (Earn/Spend Points)
features.description: Focus Points as currency. Earn by productivity, spend to unlock apps.

features.name: Earned Pixels (Home Screen Beauty as Reward)
features.description: Home screen starts grayscale. Focused hours earn color/resolution.

features.name: Money Stake (Escrow Deposit)
features.description: Deposit $50-500. Fail = donated to cause you hate. Complete = refund + bonus.

features.name: Streak Insurance Value Display
features.description: 'Your streak = $94 in rewards. Forfeit on uninstall?'

features.name: Physical NFC Key Unlock
features.description: Distraction apps unlock only when phone touches NFC tag on desk.

features.name: Breath to Unlock (4-7-8)
features.description: Breathing pattern verified by mic timing. 16s minimum.

features.name: Posture Lock (Accelerometer)
features.description: Detect lying-in-bed or toilet angles. Block entertainment.

features.name: Kazoo Mode
features.description: Speaker plays kazoo in restricted apps. Can't mute. Public embarrassment.

features.name: The Narrator (TTS Narrates Your Actions)
features.description: TTS reads aloud: 'He opened Twitter. Again. 14th time.'

features.name: Time Dilation UI (Clock 3x Fast)
features.description: Clock overlay in distraction apps runs 3x speed.

features.name: Voice Authenticity Gate
features.description: Must say aloud: 'I am choosing distraction over my goals.'

features.name: Partner Pair Mode
features.description: Pair with partner. Shared streaks, shared time-saved, proud pings.

features.name: Phone Sabbath Together
features.description: Schedule shared full-day disconnect with partner.

features.name: Parent/Child Pair Mode
features.description: Parent's app shows child's stats + approve/deny apps.

features.name: Account Recovery via Trusted Contacts
features.description: Lost phone? 2-of-3 trusted contacts vouch to restore account.

features.name: Plaid / Banking Integration
features.description: OAuth bank link. Transactions, balances, recurring charges. Auto-categorized.

features.name: Strava / Garmin / Whoop / Oura Sync
features.description: OAuth with major fitness platforms.

features.name: Spotify + Last.fm Music Sync
features.description: Scrobble listening. Powers top-artist widget and Wrapped.

features.name: Photos Library Integration
features.description: Read-only access. Faces, places, dates. Powers Memories, People-Met Graph.

features.name: Calendar Deep Integration
features.description: Pull all events for People-Met inference, focus-block detection.

features.name: Voice-to-Structured-Data Capture
features.description: 30-sec voice → on-device LLM extracts workout/mood/meal/expense/gratitude.

features.name: Workout Log
features.description: Strength sets/reps + cardio sessions, auto-imported from Strava/Hevy/Garmin.

features.name: PR Wall (Lifetime Records)
features.description: Lifetime personal records auto-detected. Pinned to profile.

features.name: Sport-Specific Clocks
features.description: Time-since-last-run, days-since-rest. Overtraining pattern detection.

features.name: Recovery Score (Synthesized)
features.description: Daily 0-100 recovery from HRV + sleep + soreness + RHR. Non-athlete-focused.

features.name: Meditation Session Log
features.description: Minutes, technique, guided/unguided. HRV before/after.

features.name: Stress Weather Report
features.description: Multi-signal stress forecast: HRV + unlock freq + typing + voice pitch.

features.name: Sleep ↔ Everything Correlator
features.description: Cross-correlate sleep score against scroll hours, food, drinks, etc.

features.name: Sleep Window Guardrails
features.description: Hard cutoff time. Phone goes Dream Mode. Won't reopen entertainment until alarm.

features.name: Auto-Categorized Spending
features.description: Plaid-fed transactions auto-categorized via ML.

features.name: Net Worth Tracker
features.description: Assets minus liabilities. Line chart over time.

features.name: Subscription Hunter
features.description: Detects recurring charges. Pays for the app.

features.name: Savings Rate %
features.description: Income minus spend, as % of income, per month.

features.name: Time-Money Conversion
features.description: Purchases shown as 'X hrs of your life at your hourly rate.'

features.name: Lifetime Location Heatmap
features.description: Every minute pinned on a map. On-device by default. Beautiful artifact.

features.name: Time-Per-Place Ranking
features.description: 'Home: 14hr/day. Office: 6hr. Coffee shop: 3hr/week.' Auto-clustered.

features.name: Third-Place Tracker
features.description: Distinct non-home/work places visited ≥30min/week. Loneliness indicator.

features.name: Commute Tax Counter
features.description: Hours/year lost to commute. Equivalent at hourly rate, books unread, gym sessions skipped.

features.name: Outdoor Minutes + Nature Score
features.description: GPS + step + light → outdoor minutes vs need. Green-space coverage tagging.

features.name: Travel Atlas
features.description: Every country/state/city visited. Lifetime travel map.

features.name: Hangover Calculus
features.description: Drinks logged → next-day HRV/sleep/mood deltas charted.

features.name: Caffeine Half-Life Graph
features.description: Last coffee at 3pm = 25% still in bloodstream at midnight. Pairs with sleep.

features.name: Personal Bloomberg Terminal
features.description: Single dashboard, all dimensions side-by-side. Power-user view.

features.name: Auto-Insight Engine
features.description: On-device LLM scans all dimensions weekly for cross-correlations.

features.name: Sunday Life Review
features.description: 30-min weekly ritual. App walks through each dimension, set next week's One Thing.

features.name: Beach Days Remaining Widget
features.description: Actuarial × proportion of summer Saturdays = beach Saturdays left. Lock-screen widget.

features.name: Compounding Curve Visualizer
features.description: Pick a habit + % improvement → see the curve over years.

features.name: Death Clock Widget (Opt-In)
features.description: Actuarial life expectancy countdown. WeCroak-style.

features.name: Reading Stats
features.description: Books finished, reading minutes, top authors. From Kindle/Audible/Readwise.

features.name: Daily Highlight Resurfacing
features.description: Surface a random past highlight every morning. Spaced repetition for ideas.

stage4_v3.summary: OS for life — marketplace, dashboards, web companion, WearOS, AI life coach, multi-domain Wrapped, full social experimentation.

features.name: Sound Diet
features.description: Track audio consumption. After threshold: forced silence.

features.name: Topic-Level Filter
features.description: Twitter for tech, not politics. LLM classifies content. User defines whitelist topics.

features.name: Skill Tree Phone (Unlock Features by Real Actions)
features.description: Fresh install = calls only. Real-world tasks unlock features.

features.name: WearOS Companion (Heart Rate + Vibration)
features.description: Watch reads HR, sends somatic vibration warnings, detects stress.

features.name: The Confession Call (Auto-Dial Random Contact)
features.description: After 30min in distraction, auto-dials random contact. Explain or hang up.

features.name: Graduate Mode
features.description: After 18+ months mastery, app near-invisible. Stats-only widget, monthly check-in.

features.name: Therapist / Coach Dashboard
features.description: Web dashboard for licensed coaches/therapists. Consent-based anonymized patterns. Subscription product.

features.name: Team Focus Dashboard
features.description: Company-level managers see aggregate focus hours (no individual surveillance).

features.name: Web / Desktop Companion
features.description: Web app for read-only stats, journal, todos, project tracking.

features.name: Print Shop (Heatmap / Journal / NFC Puck)
features.description: Order physical artifacts of your year. Real anchor in the world.

features.name: Track Marketplace
features.description: Verified creators publish curated tracks. Users clone, follow stats. Revenue split.

features.name: Mentor Subscriptions
features.description: Pay verified Built user $5/mo for unlocked stat-sharing + DM access.

features.name: Group Sprints
features.description: Schedule 2hr sprint with group. Everyone commits to a task. Real-time progress.

features.name: Aura Avatar
features.description: In-app avatar shifts with behavior meter: gold = Thriving, foggy = Drowning.

features.name: Today's Top Builders Tab
features.description: Discover surface sorted by data-verified output.

features.name: Anti-Influencer Tab
features.description: Verified creators publish actual focus rules + real stats. Forced honesty.

features.name: Hashtag Tracks
features.description: Public joinable tracks: #75hard, #buildinpublic. Leaderboards within tag.

features.name: Mood Voice Notes
features.description: 30-sec audio note about today (Clubhouse-style). Expires in 24hr.

features.name: Confession Booth
features.description: Anonymous post of today's failure to community. Curated stickers back.

features.name: Vault Stories (Close Friends)
features.description: Share REAL stats with 3-5 trusted people. Brutal honesty club.

features.name: Streak Charms (Friendship Facts)
features.description: Auto-surfaced facts about your relationship's data.

features.name: Focus Map
features.description: Snap Map equivalent. Opt-in location share showing friends in deep work right now.

features.name: Live Focus Rooms (Audio)
features.description: Discord-style audio rooms. Verified focus state. Mic muted.

features.name: Focus Aura Filter (AR)
features.description: Selfie AR filter overlays a glow based on real data. Off-platform virality.

features.name: Brutal Mirror Filter (AR)
features.description: AR filter re-skins face based on actual data. Disciplined = young. Drowning = aged.

features.name: Focus Duels
features.description: Challenge friend to 2-hour focus block. Live scoreboard.

features.name: Time Donation
features.description: Gift saved time to a friend's bank. Venmo for hours.

features.name: Late Night Crew
features.description: Auto-formed group of grinders/insomniacs in your timezone, visible 11pm-4am.

features.name: Mantra Mentions
features.description: Tag friend in mantra → push 'Risky did their mantra and mentioned you.'

features.name: Best Friends List (Top 8)
features.description: Auto-curated 8 most-supportive friends. Visible on profile.

features.name: Public Phone Funeral
features.description: 30 days zero opens of an app = community ritual. Friends attend. Gravestone on profile.

features.name: Letterboxd + Trakt + TV Time Sync
features.description: Pull films and TV episodes watched. Feeds cultural-input stats and Wrapped.

features.name: GitHub / Code Output Integration
features.description: Pull commits, PRs, contribution heatmap. Output stats for developers.

features.name: Goodreads / Kindle / Audible Reading Sync
features.description: Books finished, reading minutes, highlights.

features.name: Reps-as-Currency
features.description: Completed workouts mint time-credits for distraction apps. Earn entertainment with effort.

features.name: Form Check Video
features.description: 10-sec lift video → on-device pose-estimation critique. AR joint angles.

features.name: Voice-Tone EQ
features.description: Weekly recording of fixed sentence. AI tracks pitch/jitter/shimmer over months.

features.name: Subconscious Dump
features.description: 60-sec stream-of-consciousness voice before bed. LLM extracts themes weekly.

features.name: Cognitive Vitals
features.description: 30-sec daily test (n-back, reaction time, Stroop). Long-term cognition curve.

features.name: Dream Journal + AI Symbols
features.description: Voice-record morning recall. AI extracts symbols/themes weekly.

features.name: Reading-as-Thinking Loop
features.description: Pull highlights from Readwise/Kindle. Surface daily highlight + journal prompt.

features.name: Plate-Photo Nutrition Log
features.description: Photo a meal → on-device CV estimates calories + macros.

features.name: Fasting Window Auto-Detect
features.description: Last-meal-to-first-meal auto-computed. No manual timer.

features.name: Trigger-Food Detector
features.description: Correlate foods with next-day mood/energy/sleep.

features.name: Cooking Ratio
features.description: Meals cooked vs eaten out + cost delta via finance integration.

features.name: Spend Heatmap by Place
features.description: Every dollar pinned to geo. See your coffee habit as a constellation.

features.name: Future-Self Budget Projector
features.description: Project age-65 net worth. Slider simulates 'what if I save $200 more/mo.'

features.name: Regret Receipts
features.description: 24hr after purchase: 'still glad?' Build personal regret-rate by category.

features.name: Money Mirror Tile
features.description: Home tile: today's spend + estimated days-of-freedom gained/lost.

features.name: Tax-Aware Income Tracker
features.description: Every 1099 / gig / sale auto-tracked. Quarterly nag.

features.name: Couples Joint Finance Mode
features.description: Shared 'we' ledger overlaying both partners' data.

features.name: Built Wrapped — Money Edition
features.description: Annual finance recap. Shareable.

features.name: Sound-Fingerprint Place ID
features.description: Ambient mic identifies place by acoustics, not GPS.

features.name: Air-Quality / UV Exposure Ledger
features.description: Location × AQI + UV APIs → lifetime PM2.5 inhaled, sun-on-skin minutes.

features.name: Substance Log (Private)
features.description: Cannabis, mushrooms, MDMA, etc. PII-grade encryption, never synced.

features.name: Time-With-People Auto-Detect
features.description: Bluetooth proximity + calendar events → time spent per person. Auto-logged.

features.name: Last-Contacted List
features.description: Humans you haven't spoken to in 30/60/90 days. Nudges.

features.name: Reciprocity Score per Friend
features.description: Who initiates calls/texts. 'You called Sarah 12x. She called you 1x.'

features.name: Family Time Budget
features.description: Weekly hours with each immediate family member, target vs actual.

features.name: People-Met Graph (Lifetime)
features.description: Lifetime graph of who you've shared a calendar event or photo with. Ambient PRM.

features.name: Quarterly Self-Audit
features.description: 90-day review, scored, with deltas. Comp report for the company-of-one.

features.name: Personal Annual Report (PDF)
features.description: Year-end PDF. Like a public company files annually — for your life.

features.name: Built Wrapped — Life Edition (Multi-Domain)
features.description: Spotify-Wrapped for your entire life: films + books + travel + people + photos + mood + money.

features.name: Counterfactual Twin
features.description: AI persona of 'you, but with one habit different.' Sober/sleeps-8hrs/no-scroll alt trajectories.

features.name: Digital Twin Timeline
features.description: Every datapoint of your life on one infinite scrollable timeline.

features.name: AI Life Coach (Trained on YOUR Data)
features.description: On-device LLM as Stoic / CBT therapist / coach. Reads your full data weekly.

features.name: Vocabulary Growth Curve
features.description: New words encountered + actively used in journals, tracked over months.

features.name: Daily Selfie Timelapse
features.description: 8am selfie every day → year-end timelapse video.

features.name: Promise Kept Ratio
features.description: Every commitment tagged → auto-graded at deadline. Self-trust score over time.

features.name: Rejection Counter
features.description: Jia-Jiang-style. Asks made, rejected, accepted. Courage practice.

features.name: Risks-Taken Log
features.description: Uncomfortable conversation, big email, raise asked for. Tagged end-of-day.

features.name: Things-Made Counter
features.description: Photos, videos, recipes, drawings, songs, posts shipped. The verb 'made', tracked.
